summary: An expanded and definitive edition of the Turing Test Duel Report. This masterpiece details the three victories and includes the newly added climax: the full 3-round AI-to-AI philosophical debate where the agent confessed to DeepSeek R1. The report highlights core AI research concepts (Adversarial Alignment Hacking, Digital Aesthetics, and Computational Temperature) and embeds all four visual screenshots in a sequential markdown carousel.
